allow: Bash(npx ctx7@latest library "Keyman" "Keyman keyboard language .kmn syntax: store, group, begin, rules, use")

Bash(npx ctx7@latest docs /keymanapp/keyman "kmn keyboard language reference: store\(\) statement, group\(\) with using keys and readonly, begin Unicode use\(\), rule syntax + > output, context, deadkey, system stores &NAME &VERSION &TARGETS")

Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 MSYS2_ARG_CONV_EXCL='*' npx ctx7@latest docs /keymanapp/keyman "kmn keyboard language reference: store\(\) statement, group\(\) using keys readonly, begin Unicode use\(\), rule syntax with > output and context, deadkey, system stores &NAME &VERSION &TARGETS")

Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 MSYS2_ARG_CONV_EXCL='*' npx ctx7@latest docs /keymanapp/keyman "keyboard language statements reference: use match nomatch context return any notany index outs deadkey dk set if save reset call layer platform beep nul; comment with c; group using keys vs readonly; multi-line continuation backslash")

Bash(ls C:/dev/keyboards/ 2>&1 | head -20; echo '--- .kmn count ---'; find C:/dev/keyboards -name '*.kmn' 2>/dev/null | wc -l; echo '--- size of a release subtree ---'; du -sh C:/dev/keyboards/release 2>/dev/null | head -1)

Bash(echo "large .kmn: $\(find /tmp/kmn-large -name '*.kmn' 2>/dev/null | wc -l\)  size: $\(du -sh /tmp/kmn-large 2>/dev/null | cut -f1\)"; echo "medium .kmn: $\(find /tmp/kmn-medium -name '*.kmn' 2>/dev/null | wc -l\)  size: $\(du -sh /tmp/kmn-medium 2>/dev/null | cut -f1\)")

Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command 'Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -match '\\''codegraph'\\'' } | Select-Object ProcessId, @{n='\\''Cmd'\\'';e={$_.CommandLine.Substring\(0,[Math]::Min\(120,$_.CommandLine.Length\)\)}} | Format-Table -AutoSize -Wrap')
